label: SES-148 / CNV-050 close-out — ADO planning loop for PI-122 (Build the Agent Profile Registry): the first real end-to-end exercise of the completed ADO substrate. PM dispatched PI-122 (Draft->In Progress); the decomposer created six phase Workstreams (WSK-002..007); six real phase-specialist agents scoped them feed-forward into 18 Work Tasks across four active phases (Architecture/Development/Testing/Documentation) with Data Migration + Deployment correctly Not Applicable. all_scoped=true. Addresses (advances) PI-122. The Workstreams/Work Tasks are operational records already in the live DB; this close-out records the planning session and lands the snapshot. APPLY GATE: re-verify heads (SES-148/CNV-050 next-free as of authoring) and apply in a clean window vs the parallel session.

session.session_title: ADO planning loop for PI-122 — dispatch, decompose, and scope all six phases with real specialists
session.session_executive_summary: Claude Code session running the ADO planning loop for PI-122 (Build the Agent Profile Registry) — the first real end-to-end exercise of the completed ADO substrate against a real Planning Item, dogfooding the organization to plan its own next layer. The PM dispatched PI-122 (Draft -> In Progress); the decomposer created the six phase Workstreams (WSK-002..007); six real phase-specialist LLM agents then scoped each phase in feed-forward order, producing 18 Work Tasks across four active phases (Architecture 5, Development 5, Testing 4, Documentation 4) and correctly asserting Not Applicable for Data Migration and Deployment. all_scoped is now true; the gate exposes Architecture first. Addresses (advances) PI-122.
session.session_description: First real end-to-end run of the completed ADO substrate (PI-114 / WTK-001..006) against a real Planning Item, using the two proven phase-specialist agent prompts generalized per phase. Flow: (1) the Project Manager substrate dispatched PI-122 via POST /planning-items/PI-122/dispatch (Draft -> In Progress, gated on eligibility); (2) the decomposer created the six canonical phase Workstreams WSK-002..007 (Planned) with the serial blocked_by chain; (3) six real LLM phase-specialist agents each scoped their Workstream in canonical feed-forward order, each reading its prior-phase-outputs and PI-122 before deciding its Work Tasks. Results: Architecture (WSK-002, Ready) -> WTK-007/008/009 (one methodology-product schema spec per entity: agent_profile/AGP, skill/SKL, governance_rule/GVR), WTK-010 (storage: the binding reference-edge + float/pin propagation design), WTK-011 (access: the profile->contract resolver + hybrid-governance binding design); Development (WSK-003, Ready) -> WTK-012 (storage: the single head-0036 Alembic migration for the three tables + two edge kinds), WTK-013 (access: repositories + resolver), WTK-014 (api), WTK-015 (mcp), WTK-016 (ui panels), layer-rank ordered; Testing (WSK-004, Ready) -> WTK-017/018/019/020 (storage/access/api/mcp tests, UI test deliberately omitted to match the codebase's read-only-panel convention); Documentation (WSK-005, Ready) -> WTK-021/022/023/024 (CLAUDE.md release paragraph, mark the PRD built + record resolved open questions, register the two edge kinds in governance-recording-rules, a resolver/seeding how-to); Data Migration (WSK-006) -> Not Applicable (a brand-new entity set has no existing data to backfill; seeding the two proven profiles is record-creation via close-out, not data migration); Deployment (WSK-007) -> Not Applicable (internal v2 feature that ships by landing the migration + code on main, no separate deploy). Net: 18 Work Tasks (WTK-007..024) across four active phases, two phases Not Applicable, all_scoped=true, next_executable=WSK-002. The six Workstreams and 18 Work Tasks are operational records already written to the live DB by the substrate endpoints; this close-out records the orchestrating planning session and lands the db-export snapshot. The agents ran against the live API in a clean window while the parallel PRJ-016 session was quiet. Addresses (advances) PI-122 without resolving it — execution (the Lead's per-phase start/verify/advance gate, the area specialists building each Work Task) remains. This run is the dogfood the ADO §8 bootstrap anticipated: the finished organization decomposing and planning its own first real Planning Item.
